title: lotus maritimus
intro: Lotus maritimus, also known as the sea lotus or sea flower, is a perennial plant species native to the coastal areas of Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Lotus maritimus include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and promoting skin health. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
